domain: Khmer apsara classical dance kbach hand gestures (Cambodian classical dance with >1500 distinct hand gestures; each kbach = specific noun/concept from nature/mythology; bimanual compound semantics; arm + hand position affects meaning; UNESCO intangible heritage)
specific_mechanism: KBACH-GESTURE-VOCABULARY-GATE: discrete-gesture-symbol context-gating with bimanual compound selection + MoE-routing. (1) Define K-symbol discrete gesture vocabulary V = {v_1, ..., v_K} ⊂ R^D (kbach catalog, K ~ 1500). (2) Per-context gating g(context) selects top-2 gestures (v_L, v_R) discretely from V (bimanual). (3) Compound code c = f_compose(v_L, v_R, arm_angle_L, arm_angle_R) — multi-aspect compound that determines downstream expert routing. (4) MoE-like routing: c routed to corresponding expert/branch. (5) Differs from soft mixture-gate by enforcing exactly-2-discrete top-K selection from finite catalog + bimanual compound composition + arm-angle modifier.
llm_application: KBACH-GESTURE-VOCABULARY-GATE discrete K-symbol gesture catalog context gating + bimanual top-2 selection compound code + MoE expert-routing. Differs from R397 BERBER-TIFINAGH (different — Tifinagh symbol). R412 BEDOUIN-MAJLIS (different). R435 (different). R444 SAMOAN-FALE (different — fale context). R461 KHIPU-GATE (different — bit-gated context attention). R474 NADIRCLAW (different — multi-route gate). Differs from Gated Attention head-specific sigmoid OpenReview (closest, head-specific sigmoid gate, but no discrete K-symbol vocabulary + no bimanual). MoE LLM Wolfe (top-k expert routing, but no bimanual compound semantics). Hierarchical Routing 2026 (cluster + expert tiers — closest). LLM Gesticulator 2410.10851 (different — gesture generation). Differs by DISCRETE K-SYMBOL CATALOG + BIMANUAL TOP-2 SELECTION + COMPOUND ARM-ANGLE CODE + COMPOUND-CODE TO EXPERT ROUTING.
novelty_claim: Gated Attention + MoE LLM + Hierarchical Routing + Discrete VQ-VAE cover discrete gating + MoE-routing paradigm. KBACH adds (a) discrete K-symbol gesture catalog + (b) bimanual top-2 compound selection + (c) arm-angle modifier. Recombination — borderline lookup.
content_words: discrete K-symbol gesture catalog context gating
bimanual top-2 selection compound code composition

llm_side: discrete K-symbol gesture catalog context gating
bimanual top-2 selection compound code composition
